nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=110 beats='it is the morning of the Maplewood School robot fair and Priya arrives at the Room 12 workshop early with a bag of doughnuts for Team Circuit Sparks; the door hangs ajar though it is always locked overnight; on the bench her team robot Gizmo lies in pieces, panels off, wheels out, wiring unclipped, and her stomach drops as she steps inside'>>

choices.label: Look closer at the wrecked workbench.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=112 beats='her teammate Ben arrives and together they discover it is not just Gizmo; Team Thunderbolt found their robot Vulcan taken apart and the Gearheads robot Daisy too; strangest of all nothing is broken or missing, screws are sorted into neat bins, wires are coiled like ribbon, and faint waxy scuff loops run across the floor; sabotage that tidies up after itself makes no sense at all'>>

choices.label: Take stock before the morning assembly.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='ten minutes before the whole school gathers for assembly Priya weighs where to look first: the strange sorted bins on the bench, the door and its lock that Ben swears was chained tight, or the knot of early kids in the hall who might have seen something last night; she can only manage one before the bell'>>

choices.label: Study the strange sorted bins.
Examine the workshop door and lock.
Ask the kids gathering in the hall.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the bins are sorted by size and shape with masking tape labels in blocky stencil letters reading SMALL and ROUND and SHINY; every last part of Gizmo is here, cleaned and grouped, as if someone meant to be helpful; Priya frowns, because no thief sorts screws by length'>>

choices.label: Check the labels against everyone's handwriting.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the stencil letters match no kid and no teacher; the ink smells like a dusty old typewriter ribbon and one label sits slightly crooked, as if stamped on by a machine instead of a hand; the assembly bell rings and Priya pockets a label as evidence'>>

choices.label: Head to assembly with the label in her pocket.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='Ben swears the door was chained when he rattled it at seven; the lock shows no scratches, the window is latched from the inside, and the waxy scuff loops do not come in from the hallway at all; whatever made them started and ended somewhere inside the room'>>

choices.label: Follow the scuffed loops across the floor.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the loops run from bench to bench in patient tidy lines and vanish at the old storage closet at the back of the workshop, the one place nobody has thought to check; the closet will have to wait, because the assembly bell is ringing'>>

choices.label: Head to assembly, still thinking about that closet.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the hallway is buzzing with wild guesses; one kid says Marcus from Team Thunderbolt was spotted by the bike racks at dusk looking guilty; another says a little kid stood at the workshop window after dinner time; a third saw the custodian's cart outside long after dark'>>

choices.label: Press for exactly who was seen and when.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the little kid at the window turns out to be Poppy, the small sister of Priya's teammate Jade; and Mr. Okafor the custodian was definitely working late; three names, three question marks, and no time for more because the assembly bell rings'>>

choices.label: Head to assembly with three names in mind.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=115 beats='whatever clue Priya managed to gather before the bell, she carries it into the packed gym turning it over and over in her mind; Principal Vasquez announces that three robots were tampered with overnight, that the fair will still happen with demonstrations this afternoon, that teams may use the workshop at lunch for repairs, and that anyone with information should come forward; the room murmurs with rumors, and Priya starts watching faces instead of listening'>>

choices.label: Watch the crowd while the principal talks.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=108 beats='three reactions stand out from the bleachers: Mr. Okafor slips out the side door early, twisting his cap in his hands; Marcus of Team Thunderbolt stares at his shoes and will not look toward the Sparks; and little Poppy hugs a sketchbook to her chest like a shield; lunch is the only free time before the demos, so Priya must pick one thread to pull'>>

choices.label: Catch Marcus before class.
Find Poppy and ask what she saw.
Follow Mr. Okafor.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=102 beats='Marcus is at his locker cradling a servo box, and he goes stiff when Priya walks up, insisting he never touched her precious Gizmo before she even asks; she can question him straight out right here, hang back and quietly watch what he does next, or go find his teammate Sana, who has never once kept a secret'>>

choices.label: Ask him straight out where he was last night.
Say nothing yet and watch what he does.
Talk to his teammate Sana instead.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the direct question lands like a spark in dry grass; Marcus goes red and loud, a crowd starts to gather, and a teacher looks over; Priya feels the moment tipping and knows she can take a breath and start over kindly, or wave Principal Vasquez across and say his name out loud in front of everyone'>>

choices.label: Take a breath and start over, kindly.
Wave the principal over and accuse him.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the apology catches Marcus completely off guard; the red drains out of his face as the crowd loses interest and drifts away, and in a low voice he admits he was at school at dusk last night, but it is not what she thinks'>>

choices.label: Hear him out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='Priya trails Marcus between classes; he keeps checking over his shoulder and carrying that box as if it were made of eggshells, and at break he heads straight for the Room 12 corridor and hovers outside the workshop window looking miserable'>>

choices.label: Keep following at a distance.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='Marcus tapes a paper bag and a folded note to the workshop door handle and hurries away; the note says sorry in handwriting that has been erased and rewritten twice, and the bag holds the Sparks spare motor that went missing from their bench last week'>>

choices.label: Catch up with Marcus and ask about the note.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='Sana rolls her eyes the moment Priya asks; Marcus has been a nervous wreck all week, she says, ever since he borrowed a spare motor from the Sparks bench without asking and then could not find the courage to hand it back'>>

choices.label: Find Marcus and tell him what Sana said.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='faced gently with Sana's story, Marcus lets out a breath he seems to have been holding for a week; yes he took the motor, yes he biked back at dusk to return it, and there is one more thing he has been too scared to tell anybody'>>

choices.label: Ask about the one more thing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='however it finally comes out, the story is the same: Marcus borrowed the motor without asking, panicked, and pedaled back at dusk to return it; while he stood at the locked workshop door he saw a small wobbling light glide across the room inside, low and slow like a lantern on wheels, and he ran, because he knew being seen there made him look guilty; ashamed and relieved at once, he offers the Sparks his own spare servo for Gizmo'>>

choices.label: Ask exactly what the light did.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='the light moved bench to bench in patient lines, Marcus says, never bumping a thing, while the door stayed chained the whole time; whatever took the robots apart was already inside after lockup; the lunch bell rings and the workshop is opening for repairs'>>

choices.label: Get to the workshop and check the back of the room.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=102 beats='the accusation in front of everyone goes exactly as badly as it can; Marcus is pulled from his team while the principal investigates, and it is mid afternoon before a teacher finds the real answer in the workshop, wheel tracks and a dozing old robot and a chewed chore card, clearing him completely; by then his demo slot is gone; Priya apologizes for real and he accepts it quietly; Gizmo runs fine, but no ribbon would feel right today, and Priya learns that a name said out loud without proof cannot be unsaid'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=102 beats='Poppy is behind the gym with red eyes and her sketchbook clutched tight, far too small to have taken three robots apart but plainly hiding something; Priya can sit down beside her and talk about drawing first, tell her straight that she knows Poppy was at the workshop window last night, or go and bring her big sister Jade over'>>

choices.label: Sit down beside her and talk about drawing.
Say you know she was at the window last night.
Bring her big sister Jade over.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='Priya admires the robot drawings page by page, and slowly Poppy stops gripping the book so hard; in a very small voice she says she was there last night, and that something was wrong with the shadows inside the workshop'>>

choices.label: Promise she is not in trouble and listen.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='the words land much too hard and Poppy bolts around the bleachers like a startled rabbit; Priya can follow quietly and apologize for scaring her, or let her go and spend what is left of lunch questioning the older kids instead'>>

choices.label: Follow quietly and say sorry.
Let her go and question the older kids.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='Priya finds her wedged behind the gym mats and sits down a little way off, saying sorry for the scare and holding out half a doughnut; after a long minute Poppy scoots closer and whispers that she has to tell someone or she will burst'>>

choices.label: Wait until Poppy is ready to talk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='Jade crouches down, calls her bug, and promises that nobody is mad at anybody; Poppy peeks over the top of her sketchbook, looks from her sister to Priya and back, and decides to trust them with what she saw'>>

choices.label: Listen to Poppy's story.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=115 beats='once she feels safe, Poppy tells it all in a rush: she was told she is too little for robotics club, so at dusk she snuck to the workshop to tape a good luck drawing onto Jade's robot; the door was locked, so she watched through the window, and she saw a shadow slide along the shelves all by itself, with two small green lights and a friendly little beep; she ran so fast she dropped her drawing somewhere, and she is terrified everyone will decide the sabotage was her'>>

choices.label: Ask where the drawing ended up.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='they circle to the workshop window and the drawing is not on the ground anywhere; if it ended up inside the locked workshop, then whatever moves in there picked it up after lockup; Priya draws a lookout badge in marker on Poppy's hand, deputizing her on the spot, and they plan to search the back of the workshop the moment lunch repairs begin'>>

choices.label: Head to the workshop at lunch with your new lookout.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=100 beats='without Poppy's clue the lunch hour goes nowhere; the older kids repeat the same three rumors, and repair time runs out with Gizmo only half himself; the demo is a wobbling, sputtering flop, though the crowd claps kindly anyway; only during cleanup does someone open the storage closet, and the real story rolls out on four dusty wheels for everyone to see at once; no prize, no mystery solved by her, and one small girl who still flinches when Priya walks past; tomorrow, Priya decides, she starts fixing that with an apology and a doughnut'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=102 beats='Mr. Okafor stops at the workshop door, tests the padlock twice, mutters that it is not possible, and wheels his cart with a lumpy canvas bundle toward the boiler room; Priya can knock and ask him straight, peek through the gap where the boiler room door never quite closes, or hang back and study the waxy scuff tracks he keeps frowning at'>>

choices.label: Knock on the boiler room door and ask him.
Peek through the gap in the door.
Study the waxy scuff tracks first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=94 beats='the door opens a crack and one tired eye looks out; then Mr. Okafor sighs like a man setting down something heavy and swings the door wide, saying she had better see for herself before somebody imagines something worse'>>

choices.label: Step inside the boiler room.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='through the gap she sees a workbench covered in robot parts, a wheel the size of a dinner plate, and a faded photo of a boxy robot in a bow tie leading a school assembly; then a shadow falls across her and Mr. Okafor says it is rude to peek; she can own up and ask about the photo, or slip away and tell her team what she saw'>>

choices.label: Own up and ask about the robot photo.
Slip away and tell the team what you saw.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='Priya owns it, cheeks burning, and asks about the robot in the photo; Mr. Okafor's frown turns into something softer, and he says curiosity is not a crime, though sneaking is borderline, and waves her inside'>>

choices.label: Go in and hear him out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='up close the scuffs are not boot prints at all; they are two narrow parallel lines with a zigzag tread between them, wheels, not feet, and every loop begins and ends at the storage closet at the back of the workshop'>>

choices.label: Compare the tread with the custodian's cart wheels.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the cart tread does not match at all; while Priya is still crouched over the tracks measuring, Mr. Okafor comes back for his mop, sees the wheel marks for what they are, and goes gray as ash, whispering oh no, oh Herbie, no'>>

choices.label: Ask him who Herbie is.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='the secret comes out gently: Herbie is the school's old demonstration robot, the bow tied machine that led assemblies thirty years ago and has slept in storage ever since; Mr. Okafor has spent his nights rebuilding him as a surprise for the fair's fiftieth anniversary; last night he left Herbie charging in the workshop storage closet and locked up as always; his voice fails at the thought of what a half awake Herbie might have done with his old chore programs, and he says they must go and look, right now'>>

choices.label: Hurry to the workshop with Mr. Okafor.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='keys jangle as they cut through the lunch crowd, Mr. Okafor repeating that Herbie is gentle, he was built gentle; at the workshop door his radio crackles about a spill in the cafeteria and he groans, unlocks the room for her, and promises to come back the moment he can'>>

choices.label: Go in and check the storage closet.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=105 beats='the whisper travels faster than any robot: by the end of lunch half the school has heard that the custodian keeps a bench of stolen parts, and a parent is asking pointed questions at the office; the truth rolls out by demo time, an old robot, a garbled chore card, an anniversary surprise ruined by being told wrong; Mr. Okafor is cleared completely, but the surprise he worked nights on is spoiled, and Priya knows the whisper was hers; she takes the microphone before the demos and sets the story straight, and he nods once from the doorway; the fair goes on, and the lesson stays'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=116 beats='the trail, whichever one Priya followed, ends at the storage closet at the back of the workshop while lunch repairs clatter behind her; every clue she is carrying points the same way, at something that was inside this room after lockup; the closet door hangs open a crack, and inside is an empty charging dock still faintly warm, dusty wheel tracks rolling out and back, a child's crayon drawing folded neatly on a shelf as if put away with care, and in the dock's card slot an ancient punch card, chewed along one edge'>>

choices.label: Follow the wheel tracks behind the paint tarp.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=120 beats='behind the tarp stands Herbie, the school's boxy old demonstration robot with a faded bow tie, powered down mid chore with a bench brush still gripped in one claw and bins of perfectly sorted parts at his wheels; taped to his side is a work log in careful adult handwriting, signed R. Okafor, with a clipped photo of Herbie leading a school assembly long ago: anniversary surprise, recharge Tuesday, DO NOT RUN CARD 7; the chewed card from the dock is card 7, and its half eaten label reads TIDY ALL BEN; no villain anywhere, just a mixed up machine that woke early and did a thirty year old chore on the wrong benches'>>

choices.label: Decide what to do before the afternoon demos.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=106 beats='one hour until demos and three ways to spend it: use the punch kit and the log's code page to fix Herbie's garbled chore card themselves, go find Mr. Okafor and bring the whole truth to Principal Vasquez together, or let sleeping robots lie and pour every minute into repairing the sabotaged robots first'>>

choices.label: Fix Herbie's garbled chore card yourselves.
Find Mr. Okafor and tell the principal everything.
Repair the robots first; Herbie can wait.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='the dock has a card punch and a drawer of blank cards, and the back page of the log is a code table of Herbie's chore words in tidy rows; Ben cracks his knuckles and grins that they speak robot; between the two of them they can rebuild card 7, if they pick the right way to do it'>>

choices.label: Work out the safest way to fix the card.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=102 beats='two ways stare back at them: punch a brand new card letter by letter against the code table, slow but sure, or flip the LEARN switch on Herbie's side and reteach the chore by hand, which the log says is faster but warns, in double underline, never to do while a garbled card is loaded'>>

choices.label: Punch a fresh card, carefully.
Flip the LEARN switch and reteach him by hand.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='punch, check, punch, check; the new card reads HELP ALL TEAMS and slides home with a satisfying click; Herbie hums awake with soft green eyes, reads the card, and begins wheeling bench to bench, handing every sorted part back to exactly the right robot like a nurse in a surgery'>>

choices.label: Put Herbie to work and rebuild Gizmo.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='with Herbie handing out parts the repairs fly, and the other two teams stop staring and start cheering; Gizmo comes back together with minutes to spare; they leave a thank you note on Mr. Okafor's cart and walk Herbie along to the gym themselves, so nothing surprises anybody ever again'>>

choices.label: Roll everything to the gym.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=104 beats='the LEARN switch is a mistake; Herbie wakes mid garble, chirps TIDY, picks up a mop, and trundles for the gym doors at exactly the speed of trouble; Ben flips the log open to a page about an end of chores whistle while Priya eyes the battery latch on Herbie's back, safe and sudden but sure to eat the repair hour'>>

choices.label: Yank the battery latch, safe and sudden.
Whistle the end of chores signal from the log.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='two sharp notes and one low; Herbie stops mid roll, spins in place, and comes back looking as sheepish as a refrigerator can look; the chase has eaten most of the repair hour, so Gizmo goes back together in a scramble and they wheel Herbie along to the gym rather than leave him alone'>>

choices.label: Sprint the last repairs and get to the gym.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=98 beats='the battery latch clicks and Herbie sags mid stride, safe, still, and finally harmless; but hauling him home and calming everyone down eats the whole repair hour, and the Sparks miss their slot; Principal Vasquez lets them demonstrate at the very end of the day, after the trophies, to a small crowd of stragglers and parents, and patched up Gizmo runs his routine clean; no ribbon, but the truth gets told, Herbie is promised a proper debut next year, and nothing was broken today that cannot be mended'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='they find Mr. Okafor and show him the work log and the chewed card; he sits down slowly on an upturned bucket, looks at Herbie's neat bins for a long moment, and says that not meaning to is not the same as not doing; then he stands, straightens his cap, and walks with them straight to the principal's office'>>

choices.label: Go with him to Principal Vasquez.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=108 beats='Principal Vasquez listens to the whole tangled story without interrupting once, then surprises everyone by turning to Priya: you found the truth, so what should happen now; Priya could ask to push the demos back an hour so all three sabotaged teams can repair fairly, ask that Herbie's story be told at the fair itself, or suggest keeping the whole thing quiet to spare Mr. Okafor'>>

choices.label: Ask to push the demos back an hour for fair repairs.
Ask that Herbie's story be told at the fair.
Suggest keeping it quiet to spare Mr. Okafor.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='the announcement crackles through the halls, demos pushed back an hour for technical difficulties overcome by student investigators; the workshop becomes one big pit crew, with Mr. Okafor and a freshly re carded Herbie handing back parts, and when the hour is up Herbie rides to the gym at the head of the parade'>>

choices.label: Take the extra hour, then head to the gym.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='Vasquez's eyes crinkle; fifty years of this school, she says, and the anniversary surprise turns out to be a mystery solved by students, that is the story; she plans to introduce Herbie herself, sends them off to repair, and has Herbie wheeled to the gym so the fair can meet him properly'>>

choices.label: Get Gizmo ready while the stage is set.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='Mr. Okafor shakes his head slowly and almost smiles; secrets grew this mess, little engineer, he says; but he asks what she would really do, and the principal waits too; Priya can hold her ground that nobody else needs to know, or agree that the truth should be told, kindly and in the right words'>>

choices.label: Hold your ground: nobody else needs to know.
Agree the truth should be told, kindly.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=94 beats='told kindly, it is a different story altogether: not custodian's robot wrecks fair, but the school's oldest robot got his chores mixed up and three teams got a wild morning; everyone in the office breathes easier, Mr. Okafor thanks her for the right words in the right order, and he goes to fetch Herbie so there are no more surprises'>>

choices.label: Head for the gym.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=96 beats='the secret holds for exactly one hour; when applause rolls through the gym wall, Herbie answers it from his closet with his old assembly fanfare, muffled but unmistakable, and the truth beeps its way out in the messiest possible way; there is a scramble, some blushing, and a lot of explaining mid fair; no harm is done and the demos go on, but Priya watches Mr. Okafor apologize in front of everyone anyway, and understands that a kept secret is just a surprise with worse timing'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='robots first: and the strange truth is that Herbie's sorting makes rebuilding faster, every screw already grouped by size, every wire coiled; but three teams were hit and only one of them is hers; Priya can call Thunderbolt and the Gearheads over to share the bins and rebuild together, or fix Gizmo first, because the fair will not wait'>>

choices.label: Call the other teams over to share the bins.
Fix Gizmo first; the fair will not wait.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='three teams crowd one bench line and the parts flow like a bucket brigade; grudges evaporate somewhere between the third screwdriver swap and the first shared joke; when someone finds the work log everybody agrees to fetch Mr. Okafor, who arrives mortified and then, seeing three robots nearly whole, rolls up his sleeves'>>

choices.label: Finish the last bolts together.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='three patched robots stand ready and one strange story travels the workshop in delighted whispers; Mr. Okafor insists on wheeling Herbie along to the fair himself so the old fellow is never out of sight again, and the gym doors are opening; whatever the judges decide, the morning's disaster has turned into the best lunch hour of the year'>>

choices.label: Roll to the gym together.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='Gizmo is whole again with twenty minutes to spare, but one bench over Vulcan is still in pieces and Marcus's team is losing its race against the clock; and behind the closet door Herbie has begun to hum as his charge tops off; Priya can run for Mr. Okafor and hand the humming closet to a grown up, or head for the gym, since she fixed what is hers'>>

choices.label: Run for Mr. Okafor and hand Herbie over.
Head for the gym; you fixed what is yours.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=94 beats='Mr. Okafor arrives at a jog, listens, and goes pale and grateful in the same breath; he murmurs an apology to the whole room, promises the rest of the story after the demos, and walks Herbie to the gym himself; Priya slides through the doors just as Team Circuit Sparks is called'>>

choices.label: Take your place at the start line.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=102 beats='Gizmo runs a clean routine and takes a ribbon, and it starts feeling heavy the moment the judge hands it over; across the gym Vulcan never made the start line, and Marcus's team packs their pieces into a box without looking at anybody; Herbie's humming closet got handed to a startled teacher at the last minute and sorted out safely, so no harm came of it, but Priya keeps looking at the empty start line; after the fair she carries her toolbox to Thunderbolt's bench and offers to help rebuild, because a ribbon should not weigh this much'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='however the last hour was spent, demo time arrives the way it always does, all at once; the gym is packed, the judges click their pens, and Gizmo waits at the start line, patched, blinking, and ready enough; off at the edge of the floor old Herbie sits safe and still with his bow tie straightened, drawing curious looks, the day's whole mystery folded up quietly beside the bleachers; Priya's team gathers around her, and her heart hammers in the good way for the first time since breakfast'>>

choices.label: Step up when Team Circuit Sparks is called.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=106 beats='the microphone for the thirty second team introduction is in Priya's hand and the gym goes quiet; Gizmo is ready on the line and Herbie's soft green eyes are watching from the side; she can run the routine exactly as rehearsed, invite the old robot into the demonstration itself, or spend her introduction telling the whole true story of the tidy saboteur'>>

choices.label: Run the routine exactly as rehearsed.
Invite Herbie into the demonstration.
Tell the whole true story of the tidy saboteur.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=110 beats='the rehearsed run: Gizmo hums through the gates, threads the slalom, and hits the seesaw ramp, where his patched wheel starts to wobble hard; Priya has one heartbeat to decide: trust the practice and let him ride it out, stop the run and fix the wheel right there in front of everyone while narrating like a pit crew, or grab the remote and steer around the ramp to a safer finish'>>

choices.label: Trust the practice and let Gizmo ride it out.
Stop and do a live repair, narrating every step.
Steer around the ramp and take the safe finish.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=110 beats='Priya beckons, and Herbie rolls onto the floor to a gasp that turns into applause, the oldest robot at the fair reporting for duty; three ways to share the spotlight: run the routine as a duet with Herbie handing Gizmo the payload, step back and let Herbie perform his thirty year old assembly routine first, or hand Herbie the confetti cannon and make him the grand finale'>>

choices.label: Run the routine as a duet with Herbie.
Let Herbie perform his old routine first.
Hand Herbie the confetti cannon for the finale.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=108 beats='she tells it all in her thirty seconds: the sorted screws and the stencil labels, the locked door and the wheel tracks, the custodian's secret anniversary surprise, and the chewed card that turned a gentle helper into a mystery; the gym is silent, then roaring; the judges lean in, and Priya has one breath left to decide how the story ends: dedicate the demo to Mr. Okafor and Herbie, or call the other two sabotaged teams onto the floor to run side by side'>>

choices.label: Dedicate the demo to Mr. Okafor and Herbie.
Call all three sabotaged teams up to demo together.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=100 beats='Priya keeps her thumbs off the controls and her heart in her throat; the patched wheel shudders, bites, and holds, and Gizmo sails off the ramp to the loudest cheer of the afternoon; the Sparks take second place overall, plus the judges' engineering award for a robot rebuilt from a bin of sorted parts in a single day; Mr. Okafor claps loudest of all, Herbie flashes his lights in something like pride, and Priya decides that second place earned this way beats first place any other way'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=100 beats='Priya calls the stop herself, flips Gizmo gently on his side, and narrates the wobbly wheel fix bolt by bolt like a surgeon teaching a class; the gym is dead silent, then thunderous; the run scores no course points, but the judges invent a Problem Solver prize on the spot, because, as the head judge says, this is exactly what the fair is supposed to be about; Gizmo finishes the course on a rock steady wheel, and half the little kids in the gym go home wanting a toolbox of their own'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=96 beats='the swerve is smooth and safe and costs every obstacle point the ramp was worth; Gizmo crosses the finish upright to warm applause and a scoreboard that lands the Sparks squarely in the middle; no ribbon this year, but nothing crashed, nobody got blamed for anything they did not do, and the whole strange day still counts as solved; on the way out Ben says next year they build a wheel that cannot wobble, and Priya is already sketching it in her head'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=102 beats='nobody at the fair has ever seen anything like it: Gizmo zipping the course while Herbie, thirty years his elder, hands off the payload with a courtly little bow of his claw; the crowd is on its feet before the finish line; the judges hand the Sparks the blue ribbon for showmanship, Principal Vasquez declares Herbie the fair's official anniversary guest, and Mr. Okafor polishes Herbie's bow tie with his sleeve about eleven times; the sabotage, everyone agrees on the way home, turned into the best fair in fifty years'>>

ending.title: The Oldest Robot at the Fair

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=98 beats='Herbie takes the floor and runs his old assembly routine, stiff, earnest, and completely charming, ending with the school song in warbly chimes that gets three hundred people singing along; it eats most of the Sparks' slot, and Gizmo's shortened run scores no prize; and yet, watching Mr. Okafor mouth every word of the song from the doorway, Priya cannot call it a loss; some demonstrations are worth more than trophies, and this one was thirty years late'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=100 beats='the confetti cannon fires and Herbie's oldest instinct kicks in: TIDY; he wheels through the falling streamers, catching them midair and filing them neatly into his chest bin while the gym howls with laughter; the routine is a shambles, the judges dock every point they can find, and absolutely nobody who was there will ever forget it; no prize goes home with the Sparks, but the video is legendary by dinnertime, and Herbie is officially invited back next year, cannon and all'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=100 beats='Priya dedicates the run to the two quietest members of the team, a custodian who spent his nights rebuilding a piece of the school's heart, and a robot who only ever meant to help; Mr. Okafor is called to the floor blinking hard, and Herbie leads the gym in the school song as if no time has passed at all; the demo runs clean, the anniversary surprise is saved after all, and when the fair closes, the fiftieth year photo on the wall shows a girl, a robot, and a very straight bow tie'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=102 beats='all three sabotaged teams take the floor at once and run their demos side by side, sharing the course, the ramps, and one slightly overworked stopwatch; the judges give up trying to score it separately and award a shared first for the day the fair became a team; Marcus shakes Priya's hand without being told to, the Gearheads hoist Daisy like a trophy, and over the loudspeaker Principal Vasquez says that anyone who solves a mystery this kindly can call the fair theirs'>>
